title: AXButtonItemListItem
description: Interface defining the structure of a button item within a button item list. This type is used to programmatically create button items from an array of data.

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Button item list item interface shape.

props.name: name
props.description: Unique identifier for the button item.

props.name: text
props.description: Text displayed on the button item.

props.name: icon
props.description: Icon class name to display on the button item.

props.name: divided
props.description: Whether to show a divider after this item.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the button item is disabled.

props.name: selected
props.description: Whether the button item is in selected state.

props.name: color
props.description: Color variant for the button item.
